sentences.target: Ich brauche die Anleitung für die Kaffeemaschine.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə diː ˈanlaɪ̯tʊŋ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈkafeːmaʃiːnə/

translations.de: Ich brauche die Anleitung für die Kaffeemaschine.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə diː ˈanlaɪ̯tʊŋ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈkafeːmaʃiːnə/
translations.en: I need the instructions for the coffee machine.
translations.es: Necesito las instrucciones de la cafetera.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin du mode d’emploi de la cafetière.
translations.it: Ho bisogno del manuale della macchina del caffè.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要咖啡机的说明书。
translations.yue: 我需要咖啡機嘅說明書。
translations.he: אני צריך את ההוראות של מכונת הקפה.
translations.tr: Kahve makinesinin kullanım kılavuzuna ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Tôi cần hướng dẫn sử dụng của máy pha cà phê.
translations.ar: أحتاج إلى دليل الاستخدام لماكينة القهوة.
translations.nl: Ik heb de handleiding voor het koffiezetapparaat nodig.
translations.hu: Szükségem van a kávéfőző használati útmutatójára.
translations.hi: मुझे कॉफी मशीन के निर्देश चाहिए.
translations.pl: Potrzebuję instrukcji do ekspresu do kawy.
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι τις οδηγίες για την καφετιέρα.
translations.id: Saya perlu buku petunjuk untuk mesin kopi.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de instrucțiunile pentru mașina de cafea.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for brugsanvisningen til kaffemaskinen.
translations.ja: コーヒーメーカーの取扱説明書が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the finite verb 'brauche'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; selects an accusative direct object and can take a PP complement.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Anleitung' as direct object.
Noun, feminine; head of the accusative NP functioning as the direct object of 'brauche'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP expressing purpose/beneficiary.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Kaffeemaschine' as object of the preposition 'für'.
Compound noun, feminine; head of the NP within the PP governed by 'für' (accusative).

sentences.target: Die Anleitung liegt auf dem Küchentisch.

translations.de: Die Anleitung liegt auf dem Küchentisch.
translations.en: The instructions are on the kitchen table.
translations.es: Las instrucciones están en la mesa de la cocina.
translations.fr: Le mode d’emploi est sur la table de la cuisine.
translations.it: Il manuale è sul tavolo della cucina.
translations.zh-Hans: 说明书在厨房的餐桌上。
translations.yue: 說明書喺廚房張枱上面。
translations.pt: O manual está em cima da mesa da cozinha.
translations.vi: Sách hướng dẫn ở trên bàn trong bếp.
translations.nl: De handleiding ligt op de keukentafel.
translations.hu: A használati útmutató a konyhaasztalon van.
translations.hi: निर्देश रसोई की मेज पर हैं.
translations.pl: Instrukcja leży na stole w kuchni.
translations.el: Οι οδηγίες είναι πάνω στο τραπέζι της κουζίνας.
translations.id: Buku petunjuk ada di atas meja dapur.
translations.ro: Instrucțiunile sunt pe masa din bucătărie.
translations.ja: 取扱説明書はキッチンのテーブルの上にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject NP 'Anleitung'.
Noun, feminine; head of the nominative subject NP.
Finite intransitive verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; predicate expressing location.
Wechselpräposition; takes dative here due to static location ('liegen'). Introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, masculine singular dative; determiner of 'Küchentisch' as object of 'auf'.
Compound noun, masculine; head of the NP functioning as the dative object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Er folgt der Anleitung Schritt für Schritt.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ fɔlkt deːɐ̯ ˈanlaɪ̯tʊŋ ʃʁɪt fyːɐ̯ ʃʁɪt/

translations.de: Er folgt der Anleitung Schritt für Schritt.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ fɔlkt deːɐ̯ ˈanlaɪ̯tʊŋ ʃʁɪt fyːɐ̯ ʃʁɪt/
translations.en: He follows the instructions step by step.
translations.es: Sigue las instrucciones paso a paso.
translations.fr: Il suit les instructions étape par étape.
translations.it: Segue le istruzioni passo dopo passo.
translations.ko: 그는 설명서를 보며 한 단계씩 따라 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他按照说明一步一步来做。
translations.yue: 佢照住說明一步一步咁做。
translations.ru: Он следует инструкции шаг за шагом.
translations.pt: Ele segue as instruções passo a passo.
translations.he: הוא עוקב אחרי ההוראות שלב אחר שלב.
translations.vi: Anh ấy làm theo hướng dẫn từng bước một.
translations.nl: Hij volgt de instructies stap voor stap.
translations.uk: Він дотримується інструкції крок за кроком.
translations.hi: वह निर्देशों का चरण-दर-चरण पालन करता है.
translations.pl: On krok po kroku postępuje według instrukcji.
translations.nb: Han følger instruksjonene trinn for trinn.
translations.id: Dia mengikuti petunjuk langkah demi langkah.
translations.sv: Han följer instruktionerna steg för steg.
translations.ro: El urmează instrucțiunile pas cu pas.
translations.cs: Řídí se pokyny krok za krokem.
translations.da: Han følger instruktionerne trin for trin.
translations.ja: 彼は説明書に従って一つずつ進めています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of 'folgt'.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; 'folgen' selects a dative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular dative; determiner of 'Anleitung' as the verb's dative complement.
Noun, feminine; dative NP functioning as the complement of 'folgt'.
Noun; first part of the fixed adverbial expression 'Schritt für Schritt' ('step by step').
Preposition governing accusative; within the fixed expression linking the repeated noun; the whole functions as an adverbial modifier.
Noun, accusative singular as object of 'für'; completes the fixed adverbial phrase 'Schritt für Schritt'.

sentences.target: Ich habe die Anleitung nicht verstanden.

translations.de: Ich habe die Anleitung nicht verstanden.
translations.fr: Je n’ai pas compris les instructions.
translations.hi: मुझे निर्देश समझ में नहीं आए.
translations.ja: 説明書が理解できませんでした。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary, present tense, 1st person singular; perfect auxiliary forming the Perfekt with the past participle 'verstanden'.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Anleitung' as direct object.
Noun, feminine; head of the accusative NP functioning as the direct object of 'verstehen'.
Negation particle; negates the proposition of the clause.
Past participle of the main verb; complements the auxiliary 'habe' to form the Perfekt.
